name: Red Pepper Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the peppers, onions, and celery.
2. Cover with boiling water and drain.
3. In a pot, mix vinegar, sugar, salt, and mustard/celery seed. Bring to boil.
4. Add vegetables to the pot and simmer 10 minutes, adjusting seasonings if needed.
5. Spoon into clean jars, leaving 1/8-inch headspace. Seal.
6. Process in boiling water bath for 10 minutes, if desired.
